title: Maharashtra: IMD issues yellow rain alerts and Amravati heatwave likely - NewsBytes
full_text:
Maharashtra: IMD issues yellow rain alerts and Amravati heatwave likely
Maharashtra has a bit of everything this week. IMD has put out yellow alerts for rain in Mumbai, Thane, Raigad, and Ratnagiri. Expect hot days with some relief from afternoon showers.
Meanwhile, parts of Marathwada remain under heat alerts, while Amravati in Vidarbha is likely to see heatwave conditions.
Thunderstorms likely in Kolhapur Satara Sangli
Thunderstorms with lightning are likely in Kolhapur, Satara, and Sangli. Vidarbha districts such as Nagpur and Chandrapur could see gusty winds too.
Some Marathwada areas will get light to moderate rain.
If you are in these regions, keep an eye on weather updates and follow local safety advice. It is the smart thing to do while the skies sort themselves out!
